info.title: Cardre v2 API
info.description: Auditable open-source credit scorecard builder — v2.

get.description: Return API health status.

List all registered projects from the registry.

Projects that cannot be opened (corrupt store, missing root, schema
mismatch) are reported in ``unavailable_projects`` rather than
silently skipped.

post.description: Create a new project by bootstrapping a fresh v2 store at body.path.

get.description: Get a single project by ID, resolved via the registry.
List all plans for a project.

post.description: Create a new plan for a project.

get.description: Get a single plan by ID.
List all versions of a plan.
Get a single plan version by ID.

patch.description:
Update a draft plan version's metadata (description).

Raises ``PLAN_VERSION_IMMUTABLE`` (409) if the version is already committed.

post.description:
Commit a draft plan version, making it read-only.

Raises ``PLAN_VERSION_IMMUTABLE`` (409) if already committed.

get.description: List all runs for a project.

post.description: Create and optionally execute a run for a plan version.

get.description: Get a single run by ID with summary info.
List all steps for a run.

schema.title: Response List Run Steps Projects  Project Id  Runs  Run Id  Steps Get

get.description: List all evidence edges for a run.

schema.title: Response List Run Evidence Projects  Project Id  Runs  Run Id  Evidence Get

get.description:
Get staleness explanation for a step.

Requires ``plan_version_id`` query parameter.  Keyed by step, not run.
List evidence edges for a step across plan versions.

schema.title: Response Get Step Evidence Edges Projects  Project Id  Steps  Step Id  Evidence Edges Get

get.description: Get a single artifact by ID, scoped to the project.
List manual-binning reviews, optionally filtered.

schema.title: Response List Reviews Projects  Project Id  Manual Binning Reviews Get

get.description: Get a single manual-binning review.

post.description: Apply a manual-binning edit (creates new draft version + review).
Preview WOE/IV/event-rate for a variable's bin data.

get.description: List all branches for a project, optionally filtered.

post.description: Create a new branch for challenger analysis.

get.description: Get a single branch by ID.
List all comparisons for a project.
Get a single comparison by ID.
Get the current champion assignment for a project or plan.
List exports for a project, optionally filtered by run.
List all reports for a project.
List reports for a specific run.
List all available node types for a project.

RunEvidenceEdgeResponse.title: RunEvidenceEdgeResponse
RunEvidenceEdgeResponse.description:
Typed response for a single evidence edge in a run (#216).

Includes full provenance fields from EvidenceEdgeResponse plus
nested artifacts so the generated schema and frontend types match
the actual payload shape.

UnavailableProjectResponse.title: UnavailableProjectResponse
UnavailableProjectResponse.description: A registered project that could not be opened (corrupt, missing, etc).
